examples: Has the doctor told you how to reach him or her in emergencies?
It is nonsense to say we have untrained staff dealing with emergencies.
For protection against unforeseen emergencies, you insure your house, your furnishings and your car.
People in South Yorkshire are being asked whether firefighters should scrap response time targets in emergencies.
Further, Congress is not wholly unresponsive to public preferences regarding intervention in humanitarian emergencies.
